content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid MVP development.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, leverage Claude Code to rapidly scaffold high-fidelity MVPs. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight, you transform technical debt into modular, production-ready assets. This approach automates boilerplate, enforces best practices, and creates a trackable history of shipped features, instantly validating your engineering capability to potential clients.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the silent killer of every founder’s ambition. You have the vision, the market insight, and the drive, but your repository is empty. Clients don't buy promises; they buy proof. When you lack a portfolio, you are effectively invisible in a saturated digital landscape.

But the rules of the game have shifted. With Claude Code and Antigravity, you are no longer just a founder—you are an engineering force. By automating the heavy lifting of architectural scaffolding, you can deploy professional-grade tools in hours, not weeks. It is time to turn your technical void into a competitive moat.

steps.title: Architectural Foundation with Antigravity
steps.description: Define your SaaS stack requirements to ensure your MVP is scalable and enterprise-ready from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust project architecture for a high-performance SaaS MVP using Next.js 14, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS. Focus on modularity, role-based access control, and clean API routes.

steps.title: Accelerating Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate complex CRUD logic, reducing development time by 80%.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure user authentication module and a dashboard layout that includes dynamic data fetching from Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement auth and dashboard UI based on the generated architecture.'

steps.title: Automating API Documentation
steps.description: Professional portfolios require clean documentation. Claude Code can auto-generate your API specs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive OpenAPI documentation for the current codebase, ensuring all endpoints include request schemas and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate swagger.json and update README.md with API usage examples.'

steps.title: Implementing High-Value Integrations
steps.description: Integrate Stripe or AI agents to show you can handle complex third-party workflows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a Stripe webhook handler to manage subscription states and user access levels within the application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add stripe-node, implement webhook listener, and secure endpoints.'

steps.title: Deployment and CI/CD Hardening
steps.description: Showcase production readiness by setting up automated testing and deployment pipelines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, unit tests, and deploys to Vercel upon merge to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure .github/workflows/deploy.yml for Vercel production deployment.'

pro_tips: Treat your commit history as your portfolio; ensure every Claude Code session is atomic and well-documented.
Use Antigravity to generate 'business logic' comments that explain the 'why' behind the code, proving your strategic thinking.
Always run Claude Code with a specific architectural constraint to prevent 'spaghetti code' generation.
Leverage the Claude Code 'Review' feature to audit your own generated code, showing potential clients your rigorous QA process.
Focus on building 'micro-SaaS' tools that solve single, painful problems rather than monolithic apps.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a public domain, record a 60-second demo video, and publish a 'Build Log' on X or LinkedIn to start your public feedback loop.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to build faster than 99% of your competition. Don't just dream about the product—ship it, iterate, and monetize. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
